meaning: vt.压缩,摘要叙述n.(外科)敷布
examples: This system uses powerful microchips to compress huge amounts of data onto a CD-ROM.
The bin can also compress the waste so it will take up less space.
The sheep, horses, goats and pigs brought by Europeans, however, have hard hooves, which compress the thin soil and cause erosion.
Innovation exploded as individuals, brands and organizations grappled with ways to compress time and distance.
RealJukebox can automatically compress music files to save space in notoriously cramped portable MP3 players.
